scripts.build: turbo run build --filter=react-grab --filter=@react-grab/cli && pnpm --filter ui-grab build && pnpm --filter ui-grab-mcp build
scripts.test: turbo run test --filter=react-grab --filter=@react-grab/cli && pnpm --filter ui-grab-mcp build && pnpm --filter ui-grab-mcp test
scripts.release:dry-run: pnpm build && npm publish ./packages/grab --dry-run --access public && npm publish ./packages/mcp --dry-run --access public
scripts.release: pnpm build && npm publish ./packages/grab --access public && npm publish ./packages/mcp --access public
